name: Gambling Rig
description: Gambling Rig is a dispenser manipulation mod that lets you control dispenser outcomes and decide which side wins. It rigs casino mechanics by turning random rolls into player-controlled results for consistent winning rounds.
usage: Press 'P' to open the Gambling Rig menu and apply your settings.
Rename dispenser items to 1 through 9 before using the mod.

name: OpSec
description: A client-side Minecraft mod that provides protection against client fingerprinting, tracking exploits, and other privacy focused features.
usage: Settings are applied automatically on startup.
Toggle specific protections in the config file.

name: Fake Pay
description: FakePay is a lightweight client-side utility designed for paying any amount to anyone you want without paying your real money. It is a visual-only modification.
usage: Use command /fakepay [player] [amount] to trigger a fake transaction.
This is client-side only and will not affect server-side balances.

name: Meteor Client
description: Meteor Client is an all-in-one cheat client with combat, movement, render, and automation modules for full in-game control.
usage: Press Right-Shift to open the ClickGUI.
Use the .help command for a list of chat-based controls.

name: Glazed Addon
description: Glazed Addon is a Meteor Client addon for DonutSMP. Enhanced PvP, utility, and automation features specifically for economy servers.
usage: Ensure Meteor Client is installed first.
Access modules via the 'Glazed' tab in the Meteor GUI.

name: Doomsday Client
description: Doomsday Client is a Minecraft cheat client with broad loader compatibility and fast in-game module control across many versions.
usage: Select your version in the launcher before starting.
Check the 'Movement' tab for high-speed flight modules.
